{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324012027E4F5F8F56039B4FC4C61"}"},"total":738},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7330844209339286334","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级超级超级超级超级超级好看哦，很喜欢这个故事，希望作者大大越来越好。如果我真的像女主这样的话，我很喜欢她的精神状态，超赞哦！作者大大加油加油加油加油加油加油[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706848115,"group_id":"7186949887416601658","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3SA5QGSoJJpGeYC4ASCzzt/Gjpy/vlf6PYMUSrYRaQ1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/038915dec2c04545b61366d7084648b2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877419&x-signature=R8KhYOQruirWPaWRCt3lcp4BsfI%3D","user_id":"3522479774507691","user_name":"音子哥板砖头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3522479774507691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186949887416601658","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主一心种地，无cp，温馨日常文】林安淑是个卑微又普通的社畜。公司内卷严重，老板酷爱罚钱画饼，自己战战兢兢打工一整年，一看年终奖，倒欠公司一千八。
还不如回家种田，这破工作谁爱干谁干。
一怒之下的林安淑当场炒了老板，卷铺盖回了老家。
老家依山傍水，环境很美，就是人少地多。
一心痴迷种田的林安淑无意间绑定了白富美种田系统，从此…带着全家乃至全村走上了人生巅峰。
“新鲜的蘑菇，25一斤，速抢！”
“家里种的草莓，新鲜味美，一盆188！”
“顶级蜂蜜，通便润肺，一罐520！”
“能让头顶茂盛的黑芝麻丸，1666！”
“……”
林安淑只想种田暴富，却在不经意间走上了振兴乡村，带着全村人民发家致富的道路…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oeff0919fd77d86e6b04e472a1d34a483~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"软萌淑甜","author_id":"","book_id":"7186949887416601658","book_name":"别闹！你真辞职回家种田了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#78a868","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6487人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7207638392497308171","read_count":"6487","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"579242"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"250","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,乡村,系统,种田,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/73e058d22aae4f656ea896f2782b1398~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470427&x-signature=duYxGjp8IbEYU%2BJBKH7qcN6gVas%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96521035877","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"388"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324012027E4F5F8F56039B4FC4C61"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"dig
